title: The Two Gentlemen of Verona
pairs: Who wrote The Two Gentlemen of Verona?
The Two Gentlemen of Verona was written by William Shakespeare.
What genre is The Two Gentlemen of Verona?
The Two Gentlemen of Verona is a comedy by William Shakespeare.
What kind of play is The Two Gentlemen of Verona?
The Two Gentlemen of Verona is a Shakespeare comedy.
Where is The Two Gentlemen of Verona set?
The Two Gentlemen of Verona is set in Verona and Milan.
